testcase.name: putupdateCustomerCard

failure.message: expected [{"result":[{"success":true,"message":"Customer Card Updated."}]}] but found [{"result":{"result":{"id":"\"cmacdonald@gmail.com\"","Success":false,"Message":["EmailAddress must be a valid email","PhoneNumber1 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","PhoneNumber2 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","PhoneNumber3 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","TypeID1 must be a number","TypeID2 must be a number","TypeID3 must be a number"],"Values":{"CustomerId":"\"CUSTOMER003\"","EmailAddress":"\"cmacdonald@gmail.com\"","PhoneNumber1":"\"\"","PhoneNumber2":"\"\"","PhoneNumber3":"\"\"","TypeID1":"\"1\"","TypeID2":"\"2\"","TypeID3":"\"3\"","Version":"\"4.0.0\""}}}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"result":[{"success":true,"message":"Customer Card Updated."}]}] but found [{"result":{"result":{"id":"\"cmacdonald@gmail.com\"","Success":false,"Message":["EmailAddress must be a valid email","PhoneNumber1 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","PhoneNumber2 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","PhoneNumber3 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","TypeID1 must be a number","TypeID2 must be a number","TypeID3 must be a number"],"Values":{"CustomerId":"\"CUSTOMER003\"","EmailAddress":"\"cmacdonald@gmail.com\"","PhoneNumber1":"\"\"","PhoneNumber2":"\"\"","PhoneNumber3":"\"\"","TypeID1":"\"1\"","TypeID2":"\"2\"","TypeID3":"\"3\"","Version":"\"4.0.0\""}}}}] at com.NexustAPIAutomation.java.CommonMethods.putMethodstring(CommonMethods.java:895) at Private.customerControllerV4.putupdateCustomerCard(customerControllerV4.java:107) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541) ... Removed 33 stack frames

testcase.name: putupdateCustomersInfov4

failure.message: expected [{"Customer":[{"Acknowledge":0,"Success":false,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Customer is the current customer for one or more locations and cannot be marked inactive."}]}]}] but found [{"result":{"id":"\"{\\\"Customer\\\":[{\\\"CustomerId\\\":\\\"CUSTOMER009\\\",\\\"CustomerType\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":1,\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Individual\\\"},\\\"Inactive\\\":true,\\\"CustomerClass\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"RES-METERED\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Residental Metered\\\"},\\\"Name\\\":{\\\"Title\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"2\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Mr.\\\"},\\\"FirstName\\\":\\\"Anthony\\\",\\\"MiddleName\\\":\\\"W\\\",\\\"LastName\\\":\\\"Bendetto\\\",\\\"NameSuffix\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"MaidenName\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"PlaceOfWork\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"PrimaryLanguage\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"EmailAddress\\\":\\\"uCustomer009@cogsdale.com\\\",\\\"SSN\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"765765\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"DateOfBirth\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"2031-04-11\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"AlternateId\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"IssuedBy\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"Country\\\":\\\"USA\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"BusinessAs\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"Confirm\\\":0,\\\"Success\\\":true,\\\"Messages\\\":[{\\\"Enabled\\\":0,\\\"Info\\\":\\\"\\\"}]}]}\"","Success":false,"Message":["JSONData must be of type object"],"Values":{"JSONData":"\"{\\\"Customer\\\":[{\\\"CustomerId\\\":\\\"CUSTOMER009\\\",\\\"CustomerType\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":1,\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Individual\\\"},\\\"Inactive\\\":true,\\\"CustomerClass\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"RES-METERED\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Residental cannot be marked inactive."}]}]}] but found testcase.name: putupdateCustomersInfov4Pos
